title: Tighten verbose offering bullets to one line each
guidance: Reward maximal cut with meaning intact.

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite each long bullet as one tight line carrying one verb and one object.

items: We will work collaboratively with your team to deeply understand the existing claims process and all of its many nuances
Our platform is able to leverage a robust and comprehensive set of integrations with your existing systems of record
We provide a fully auditable trail so that every single decision made by the agent can be inspected and reviewed
We aim to deliver an initial pilot within a timeframe of approximately eight weeks from project kick-off
We offer ongoing support and continuous improvement to ensure the solution keeps delivering value over time

rubric_notes: E.g. 'Map your claims process in week one.' / 'Integrate with your systems of record.' / 'Every agent decision is auditable.' / 'Pilot live in 8 weeks.' / 'Ongoing tuning post-launch.'
